post.summary:
Create a new space from an existing backup
Required permissions (both):
- restore:serverless_backups
- write:serverless_spaces

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: backupId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the backup (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

get.summary:
ListSpaces returns all spaces for the authenticated user
Required Permissions:
- read:serverless_spaces

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: cloudProviderId
parameters.description:
Cloud provider where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the provider IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviders` method, which supports serverless regions.
In this case, `hybrid` isn't supported.

parameters.name: cloudProviderRegionId
parameters.description:
Cloud provider region where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the region IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviderRegions` method, which supports serverless.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description:
Maximum number of items to return.
If not specified, all items are returned.

parameters.name: pageToken
parameters.description:
A page token, received from a previous call.
Provide this to retrieve the subsequent page.
When paginating, all other parameters provided to the request must match
the call that provided the page token.

get.summary:
Suggests a unique and human-friendly name for a new space in the specified account.
This can be used by clients to pre-fill the name field when creating a new space.
Required permissions:
- None (authenticated only)

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

get.summary:
Gets a space in the account identified by the given ID.
Required permissions:
- read:serverless_spaces

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
The identifier for the space (in GUID format).
This space should be part of the provided account.
This is a required field.

delete.summary:
DeleteSpace removes a space by ID
Required Permissions:
- delete:serverless_spaces

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description:
The identifier of the account (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description:
ID of the space to delete (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: deleteBackups
parameters.description: If set, the backups of this space will be deleted as well.

post.summary:
CreateSpace creates a new space with the specified configuration
Required Permissions:
- write:serverless_spaces

parameters.name: space.accountId
parameters.description:
Identifier of the account associated with the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

put.summary:
Updates a space in the account identified by the given ID.
Required Permissions:
- write:serverless_spaces

parameters.name: space.accountId
parameters.description:
Identifier of the account associated with the space (in GUID format).
This is a required field.

parameters.name: space.id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the space (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

id.description:
Unique identifier for the space (in GUID format).
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

createdAt.description:
Timestamp when the space was created.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

name.title:
Name of the space.
This is a required field and should be unique within the account.
Name can only contain letters, numbers, underscores and dashes

deletedAt.description:
Timestamp when the space was deleted (or is started to be deleting).
This is a read-only field and will be set after DeleteSpace is called.

cloudProviderId.description:
Cloud provider where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the provider IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviders` method, which supports serverless regions.
In this case, `hybrid` isn't supported.
After creation, this field cannot be changed.

cloudProviderRegionId.description:
Cloud provider region where the space is hosted.
Must match one of the region IDs returned by the `qdrant.cloud.platform.v1.PlatformService.ListCloudProviderRegions` method, which supports serverless.
After creation, this field cannot be changed.

labels.title:
List of labels for a space. These labels are used in the cloud ui and billing reports.
This is an optional field

costAllocationLabel.description:
When using cloud provider marketplaces for billing, the space label with the configured key is sent while metering
usage data as additional meta data to be used for cost allocation in the billing reports.

configuration.description:
Current configuration details of the space.
This is a required field.

createdBy.description:
The caller who created the space.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

lastUpdatedBy.description:
The caller who last updated the space.
This is a read-only field and will be set after UpdateSpace is called.

deletedBy.description:
The caller who initiated deletion of the space.
This is a read-only field and will be set when deleted_at is set.

state.description:
Status of the space
All fields inside `state` are read-only.

space.description:
The actual space
This is a required field.

updateMask.description:
Optional mask of fields to update. When set, only the fields listed in
the mask will be updated; all other fields retain their current values
on the server. Field paths reference the resource (Space) message,
not the request envelope (e.g. "name", "configuration.allowed_ip_source_ranges").
When unset or empty, the request is treated as a full-resource
replacement (the existing behavior).

SpaceServiceUpdateSpaceBody.title: UpdateSpaceRequest is the request for the UpdateSpace function

v1ActorType.description:
ActorType specifies the type of actor that can call a method.

 - ACTOR_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default, unspecified actor type. Should generally not be used explicitly in options
unless to signify an error or uninitialized state.
 - ACTOR_TYPE_USER: Represents a human user, typically authenticated via an identity provider (Auth0).
 - ACTOR_TYPE_MANAGEMENT_KEY: Represents a programmatic access key, also called management key,
that is not be tied to a specific user or service account identity, but rather an account.
 - ACTOR_TYPE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT: Represents a service account or machine user, often used for M2M communication.
This is for internal platform use only.

actorId.description: Unique identifier of the actor (user UUID, management-key id, service-account id, …).

userAgent.description:
HTTP User-Agent of the client that initiated the request, when available.
Omitted for internal/service-initiated actions without a client User-Agent.

v1Caller.description: Caller identifies the authenticated actor that performed an action on a resource.

v1CreateSpaceFromBackupResponse.description: CreateSpaceFromBackupResponse is the response for the CreateSpaceFromBackup function.

space.title: Space represents a space in the Qdrant serverless environment

v1CreateSpaceResponse.title: CreateSpaceResponse provides details about a created space

v1DeleteSpaceResponse.title: DeleteSpaceResponse is an empty response for deletion confirmation

v1GetSpaceResponse.title: GetSpaceResponse is the response from the GetSpace function

key.title: The key part of a key-value pair

value.title: The value part of a key-value pair

v1KeyValue.description:
KeyValue is a key-value tuple (used in e.g. node selectors / annotations)
The message represents an object for Kubernetes.

items.title: List of spaces with their details

totalSize.description:
The total number of items available (useful in relation with pagination).
This field is fill out when pagination is used (aka in the request `page_size` was provided).

nextPageToken.description:
A token that can be sent as `page_token` to retrieve the next page.
If this field is omitted, there are no subsequent pages.

v1ListSpacesResponse.title: ListSpacesResponse contains the list of spaces

v1Space.description:
Space represents a space in the Qdrant serverless environment.
It can be used to store collections which can hold points.

lastModifiedAt.description:
Timestamp when the space configuration was last updated.
This is a read-only field and will be available after a space is created.

allowedIpSourceRanges.description:
List of allowed IP source ranges for this space.
This is an optional field.
The CIDRs supports IPv4 only.

allowedOrigins.description:
Custom origins (scheme + host, e.g. "https://app.example.com") from which
browser-based clients are allowed to call the space, via CORS.

Optional. Leave empty if the space will only be accessed server-to-server
(e.g. via SDK) rather than from a browser — no Origin header means CORS
does not apply and this list is not used.

Each entry must be a valid HTTP(S) origin: scheme + host + optional port,
with no path, query, or trailing slash (e.g. "https://foo.com", not
"https://foo.com/" or "https://foo.com/app").

Max 10 origins per space. Duplicates are not allowed.

platformMaxStorageBytes.description:
Platform-enforced storage ceiling for this space, derived from the account's quota and platform defaults.
This is a read-only field. A value of 0 means unlimited.

maxStorageBytes.description:
Optional customer-defined storage cap, used for cost control.
When set, it must not exceed `platform_max_storage_bytes`.
This field is writable via UpdateSpace. If left unset, only the platform ceiling applies.

maxCollectionsPerSpace.description:
Platform-enforced limit on the number of collections for this space, derived from the account's quota and platform defaults.
This is a read-only field. A value of 0 means unlimited.

v1SpaceConfiguration.description: A SpaceConfiguration represents the configuration of a space in the Qdrant serverless environment.

url.title: URL to access the qdrant space (aka serverless database) without port

restPort.title: The port to use for HTTP REST calls (6333)

grpcPort.title: The port to use for gRPC calls (6334)

v1SpaceEndpoint.description:
Endpoint information to access the qdrant space (aka serverless database).
All fields in this message are a read-only field.

phase.description: The current operational status of the space.

reason.description:
Descriptive message explaining any errors or issues with the space.
Empty when the space is operating normally.

endpoint.description:
The URL endpoint where clients can connect to and interact with the space.
Not set if the space is not yet ready or is disabled.

v1SpaceState.description:
SpaceState represents the operational state of a space in the Qdrant serverless environment.
It provides status information, error details (if any), and endpoint access information.

v1SpaceStatePhase.description:
SpaceStatePhase defines the operational phases of a Qdrant serverless space.

 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_UNSPECIFIED: Unspecified phase.
 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_PROCESSING: The Space is being created, updated, or undergoing maintenance.
 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_READY: The Space is fully operational and available for use.
 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_DISABLED: The Space has been temporarily or permanently disabled.
 - SPACE_STATE_PHASE_DELETING: The Space is being deleted.

name.description: The suggested name for a new space.

v1SuggestSpaceNameResponse.title: SuggestSpaceNameResponse is the response from the SuggestSpaceName function

v1UpdateSpaceResponse.title: UpdateSpaceResponse is the response from the UpdateSpace function
